changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE knowledge_document ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS uploader_type VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ADMIN', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS uploader_user_id BIGINT, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS visibility_type VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PUBLIC', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extension_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_markdown TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS vector_config_json TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS category_id BIGINT;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_knowledge_document_visibility_type ON knowledge_document(visibility_type);

changeSet.author: codex
codex
codex
codex
codex
